Title: Add New Catalog
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Catalog module accessible
Steps:
1. Open Catalog module > Add > Click Catalog
2. Verify screen displays with required fields
3. Fill Catalog name field (required)
4. Configure Language block if needed
5. Click Create
Expected Result:
- System displays new catalog screen
- Catalog name field marked as required
- Language block visible and functional
- System saves new catalog successfully
- New catalog appears in catalog list

Title: Edit Existing Catalog
Preconditions: Admin logged in, at least one catalog exists
Steps:
1. Right-click on existing catalog > Manage
2. Verify edit screen displays
3. Review blocks: Name (required), Language, Property
4. Modify catalog name
5. Change language settings
6. Modify property settings
7. Click Save
Expected Result:
- Edit screen displays with catalog data
- Name field is required
- Language block shows current selection
- Property block displays correctly
- System saves all changes
- Updated catalog reflects changes

Title: Delete Catalog - Cancel
Preconditions: Admin logged in, multiple catalogs exist
Steps:
1. Right-click on any catalog > Delete
2. Verify confirmation dialog appears
3. Click Cancel
Expected Result:
- Confirmation dialog displays
- System does not delete catalog
- Catalog remains in list
- No data loss

Title: Delete Catalog - Confirm
Preconditions: Admin logged in, test catalog exists
Steps:
1. Right-click on test catalog > Delete
2. Verify confirmation dialog
3. Type 'Yes' in confirmation field
4. Click Confirm
Expected Result:
- Confirmation dialog requires typing 'Yes'
- System deletes catalog after confirmation
- Catalog removed from list
- Related data handled appropriately

Title: Add Catalog with Multiple Languages
Preconditions: Admin logged in, Catalog module accessible
Steps:
1. Open Catalog module > Click Catalog
2. Click Language selector
3. Select default language
4. Add additional languages
5. Click OK > Create
Expected Result:
- Language selector displays available languages
- Can select one default language
- Can add multiple additional languages
- System saves catalog with selected languages
- All languages available in catalog

Title: Add New Language Value to Catalog
Preconditions: Admin logged in, at least one catalog exists
Steps:
1. Go to Catalog module
2. Right-click on any catalog > Manage
3. Click on Languages widget
4. Click Edit button next to Default language title
5. Enter new language value in input field
6. Click Add
7. Click Save
Expected Result:
- Manage dictionary values screen displays
- New language value added to list
- Changes saved successfully
- New language available for selection as default or additional

Title: Delete Language Value from Catalog
Preconditions: Admin logged in, language value added via C180483
Steps:
1. Navigate to catalog Languages widget
2. Click Edit button
3. Select language value to delete
4. Click Delete
5. Confirm deletion
Expected Result:

- Delete confirmation appears
- Selected language deleted from list
- Changes saved successfully

Title: Add New Image to Category

Title: Add QuickReview Description to Category
Preconditions: Admin logged in, catalog with category_1 created
Steps:
1. Open Catalog > Select category_1
2. Click Description widget
3. Click Add > Choose QuickReview type
4. Choose language (e.g., EN-en)
5. Add description content
6. Click Save
7. Verify widget counter increases
8. Go to Storefront > Open category_1
9. Verify description displays via Liquid
Expected Result:
- Description widget opens
- QuickReview type selectable
- Language selector works
- Description saved successfully
- Widget shows count increase
- Description visible on storefront (via Liquid template)

Title: Add FullReview Description to Category
Preconditions: Admin logged in, catalog with category_1 created
Steps:

2. Click Description widget
3. Click Add > Choose FullReview type

6. Click Save

Title: Delete Category with Descriptions
Preconditions: Catalog with category_1 created, description_1 added to category_1
Steps:
1. Open Catalog > Locate category_1 with description_1
2. Right-click > Delete category_1
3. Confirm deletion
4. Check on storefront
5. Verify category and descriptions removed
Expected Result:
- Category removed with all content
- Descriptions deleted along with category
- Category no longer on storefront
- No orphaned description data
- Deletion properly cascades

9. Save and verify
Expected Result:

- Can add new vendors
- Vendors added to Companies and Contacts list
- Vendor selection saved with product
